message:
test(session+rpc): expand fault injection, V2 migration verification, RPC export/fork, and QA policy test suites

Session persistence fault injection (e2e_session_persistence.rs):
- Add jsonl_fault_injection_flush_windows_preserve_integrity test exercising
  three crash-window scenarios: pre-flush (pending mutations lost on drop),
  mid-flush (save to invalid path fails, original persisted state preserved),
  and post-flush (mutations survive exactly once after successful save)
- Add v2_fault_injection_flush_windows_preserve_integrity with identical
  three-window coverage for V2 sidecar-backed sessions
- Add migration_roundtrip_preserves_messages verifying JSONL→V2→reopen fidelity
- Add user_texts_in_order() and assert_no_duplicate_user_texts() helpers that
  detect deduplication regressions across flush boundaries

V2 migration verification (session_store_v2.rs):
- Add migrate_jsonl_to_v2_creates_verified_sidecar testing the full atomic
  migration pipeline: sidecar creation, fidelity verification (entry count,
  hash chain, index consistency), and migration ledger recording
- Add verify_v2_against_jsonl_detects_missing_entries checking that deliberate
  entry omissions are caught by the verification pass
- Add migrate_jsonl_to_v2_idempotent verifying re-migration over existing
  sidecar produces consistent results without corruption
- Consolidate duplicate imports (SessionEntry, EntryBase, MigrationState) and
  remove unused make_session_info_entry helper

RPC session connector (rpc_session_connector.rs):
- Add large_export_session() (600 entries × 2KB payload) and large_fork_session()
  (900 entries × 1KB payload) helpers for exercising RPC state export/fork under
  realistic data volumes
- Add MAX_FORK_EXPORT_STATE_ROUNDTRIP_MS (750ms) latency bound constant
- Import SessionEntry and Path for fork verification assertions

QA docs policy validation (qa_docs_policy_validation.rs):
- Add orchestrate_script_generates_pgo_pipeline_summary_artifact verifying the
  PGO pipeline summary artifact path and schema fields in orchestrate.sh
- Add bench_extension_workloads_script_pgo_mode_validation verifying PGO mode
  parsing and pipeline event emission in the benchmark workloads script

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
